index.title: Umguquli Wezixhobo
index.description: Vula izicelo zokutsala eziguqulelwe ngomatshini zeefayile zezixhobo nakweyiphi na i-repo, nakweyiphi na ifomathi.
index.badge: v3.0 - Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Umguquleli wezixhobo uvula izicelo zokutsala eziguqulelwe ngomatshini kwiifayile zakho zezixhobo usebenzisa i-Azure AI Translator nge-SDK esemthethweni - akukho nkonzo zongezelelweyo, nje ukuhamba komsebenzi.
index.workflowTitle: Ukuguqulelwa njengomsebenzi womsebenzi, hayi umsebenzi womsebenzi.
index.workflowBody: Lahla isenzo kwi-CI yakho esele ikho, uyikhombe kwi-Azure AI Translator, kwaye uvumele i-repo yakho ithethe zonke iilwimi ozijolise kuzo.

formats.title: Iifomathi zefayile ezintandathu
formats.body: Uhambo olujikelezayo .resx, .xliff, .po, .json, .ini, kunye ne .restext kunye nokufomatha okuzinzileyo kwe-byte.

config.title: Ukumiselwa kwenkqubo yenqanaba le-Repo
config.body: Lahla .github/resource-translator.yml ukuze uquke i-globs, i-glossaries, kunye neendidi zabaguquleli abaqhelekileyo.

glossary.title: I-Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Tshixa amagama e-brand kunye nemigaqo yemveliso nge-regex yegama elihlakaniphile eliphatha i-C ++, .NET, kunye nabahlobo.

dryRun.title: I-Dry-run + i-soft-fail
dryRun.body: Jonga iinguqulelo ngaphandle kokubhala iifayile, okanye ubonise yonke impazamo njengesilumkiso ngelixa uphinda.

outputs.title: Iziphumo ze-PR-friendly
outputs.body: Isishwankathelo-isihloko, isishwankathelo-iinkcukacha, kunye ne-has-new-translations zifaka ngqo kwi-create-pull-request.

sdk.title: I-SDK esemthethweni ye-Azure
sdk.body: Yakhelwe kwi-@azure-rest / ai-translation-text + @azure / core-rest-pipeline - ukuzama ngokuzenzekelayo kwi-408/429/5xx, akukho HTTP eqengqelekayo ngesandla. esbuild-bundled, audit-clean.

getting-started.title: Ukuqala
getting-started.lede: Yongeza ifayile yokuhamba komsebenzi, ikhombe kwiziqinisekiso zakho ze-Azure AI Translator, kwaye isenzo - esakhiwe kwi-SDK esemthethweni yeMicrosoft ye-@azure-rest / ai-translation-text - iya kuskena i-repo yeefayile zezixhobo zolwimi lomthombo kwaye ikhuphe abantakwabo abaguqulelweyo.

provision.title: Ukubonelela ngesibonelelo se-Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Yenza umthombo we-Azure AI Translator kwi-portal ye-Azure, uze ugcine oku kulandelayo njengeemfihlo zokugcina i-GitHub ukuze ukuhamba komsebenzi kukwazi ukuzifunda:

resource.title: Yenza ifayili yovimba omthombo
resource.body: Iifayile zemithombo zisebenzisa igama. <sourceLocale>. <ext> Ingqungquthela. Umzekelo Greetings.en.resx uba Greetings.fr.resx, Greetings.de.resx, njalo njalo emva kokubaleka.

output.title: Hlola isiphumo
output.body: Nje ukuba ukuhamba komsebenzi kugqityiwe, isenzo siveza iziphumo ezintathu onokuzifaka kwinkcazo ye-PR: isishwankathelo-isihloko, isishwankathelo-iinkcukacha, kunye neenguqulelo ezintsha. Ikwabhala isishwankathelo seMarkdown kwiphepha lomsebenzi nge-core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Amanyathelo alandelayo
nextSteps.recipes: Jonga iiresiphi ze-monorepos, ii-glossaries zesiko, kunye neendidi zoMguquleli wesiko.

configuration.title: Ukuqwalaselwa kwenkqubo
configuration.lede: Bonisa ukungagqibeki kube kanye kwi .github/resource-translator.yml kwaye uvumele yonke imisebenzi ifumane ilifa. Igalelo lezenzo lihlala liphumelela xa zombini zinikezelwa.

inputs.title: Igalelo kunye neziphumo
inputs.lede: Igalelo ngalinye lamkelwe kwifayile yokuzikhethela ye-repo config. Xa zombini zibekiwe, igalelo lesenzo liphumelele.

formats.title: Iifomathi zefayile
formats.lede: Iifomathi ezintandathu zezixhobo ezijikelezayo. Isenzo sifunda ifayile nganye yomthombo-wendawo, siguqulela amaxabiso, kwaye sibhala umntakwabo kwindawo ekujoliswe kuyo.

recipes.title: Iindlela zokupheka
recipes.lede: Iipateni eziqhelekileyo zokuguqulela ngenqanawa: ii-monorepos, ii-glossaries, iindidi zesiko, ukubaleka okomileyo, kunye nolawulo lwethoni.

faq.title: Imibuzo Yarhoqo
faq.lede: Iimpendulo ezikhawulezayo kwimibuzo ephakama rhoqo xa uthatha isenzo.

translations.title: Iinguqulelo
translations.filterPlaceholder: Khangela ngolwimi, ikhowudi okanye igama lomthonyama ...

contributing.title: Igalelo
contributing.lede: Iingxelo zebug, izicelo zeempawu, kunye nezicelo zokutsala zonke zamkelekile. Isenzo sincinci ngokwaneleyo ukuba sibe nobubele kubanikeli bexesha lokuqala.

changelog.title: Utshintsho lwelog
changelog.lede: Isishwankathelo esiphezulu sokukhutshwa. Utshintsho lwe-canonical, olunegunya luhlala CHANGELOG.md kwindawo yokugcina.
